novel_features.name: Stale-dirty rooms
novel_features.description: Find rooms that have been dirty longer than a threshold so you can chase them before arrivals.

novel_features.name: Today board
novel_features.description: One-shot front-desk dashboard: arrivals, departures, in-house, unassigned, dirty rooms, today's ADR and occupancy.

novel_features.name: Rate drift
novel_features.description: Show how rates moved over a window, by date, plan, and room type.

novel_features.name: Occupancy trend
novel_features.description: Daily occupancy, ADR, and RevPAR series with week-over-week deltas.

novel_features.name: Source mix
novel_features.description: Bookings, nights, and revenue by source (Booking.com, Expedia, Direct, Airbnb) over a window.

novel_features.name: Unpaid upcoming
novel_features.description: Reservations arriving in the next N days with non-zero balance.

novel_features.name: No-show audit
novel_features.description: No-show rate by source, room type, and lead-time bucket; flags repeat no-show guests.

novel_features.name: Guest history search
novel_features.description: Full-text search across guest name, email, phone, and notes; returns past stays with totals.

novel_features.name: Mirror reconcile
novel_features.description: Compare local mirror to live API for a sampled window; emit a typed diff.

novel_features.name: Reservation timeline
novel_features.description: Single-reservation forensic view: status changes, payments, notes, room assignments — chronological.

novel_features.name: Night audit pack
novel_features.description: End-of-shift bundle: arrivals not checked-in, departures not checked-out, unbalanced folios, payments since last audit.
